/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=gnu++17 -O0 -fno-rtti -Wno-deprecated -Werror -g CMakeFiles/hello.dir/hello.cpp.o -o ../bin/hello   -L/home/SVF-tools/SVF/llvm-16.0.0.obj/lib  -L/home/SVF-tools/SVF/Debug-build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/SVF-tools/SVF/llvm-16.0.0.obj/lib:/home/SVF-tools/SVF/Debug-build/lib:/home/SVF-tools/SVF/z3.obj/bin /home/SVF-tools/SVF/z3.obj/bin/libz3.so
